name: Christmas Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the melted butter or margarine, honey, brown sugar, and eggs with a wire whisk or fork until just blended.
2. Stir in the whole-wheat flour and remaining ingredients (baking powder, all-purpose flour, salt, and 3 tablespoons sugar) using a spoon.
3. Divide the dough into three balls. Wrap two balls in plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to use.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. On a floured large cookie sheet, roll out the remaining ball of dough into a rectangle slightly larger than 15x13 inches using a floured rolling pin.
6. Trim the sides to make a 15x12 inch rectangle.
7. Using the dull edge of a knife, score the rectangle lengthwise into three strips and then each strip crosswise into five rectangles.
8. Decorate the center of each rectangle by pressing your favorite holiday cookie cutter into the dough without cutting all the way through (use the same cutter for all or choose as many different ones as you like).
9. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar.
10. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until the edges begin to brown. Let cool on a wire rack for 2 minutes, then slice onto the rack to cook completely.
11. Repeat with the remaining dough and sugar.
12. Once cooled, break each large rectangle into 15 smaller rectangles along the scored lines.
13. Makes 45 crackers.
